# terrible_pcg_alpaca_operator_alpaca_command (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `command` (String) Definition of the desired command. The definition can include fields such as `command.name`, `command.agent_id` or `command.agent_name`, `command.process_id`, `command.parameters`, `command.schedule`, `command.history`, `command.escalation`, etc.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `system` (String) Dictionary containing system identification. Either `system.system_id` or `system.system_name` must be provided.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether any changes were made
- `changes` (String) Dictionary containing the differences between the current and desired command configuration. Only returned when a change is detected or would occur in check mode.
- `msg` (String) Status message describing what the module did
- `payload` (String) Full payload that would be sent to the API (in check_mode) or that was sent (when changed)
